hotel_name: Khách sạn D.Residence Ninh Bình (D.Residence Hotel Ninh Binh)

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Phòng khá mới, tổng thể khá oke, nhưng có nhiều điểm trong phòng chưa hợp lý. Đặc biệt là phòng tắm. Mình ở phòng Suite, phòng tắm có bathtub nhưng không có buồng tắm đứng riêng, rất bất tiện khi chỉ muốn tắm nhanh và ko ngâm bồn. Đứng tắm trong bathtub nước văng tùm lum ướt hết sạch sàn, rất bẩn và mất an toàn vì trơn trượt, dễ ngã sấp mặt khi bước chân ra khỏi bồn. Đường ống nước wc hình như nối nhau giữa các tầng nên các tầng khác giật nước cái là phòng mình nghe rõ mồn một, đêm hôm ngủ ko yên.   Ngoài ra cống cũng rất hôi, đổ nước thơm vào cũng ko hết mùi, hôi dã man khắp phòng luôn.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
It was a nice, clean, modern apartment. The bathroom was good too.
Staff were nice and helpful, we left our luggage at reception before checking in, that was no problem.
Breakfast was simple but nicely served and we appreciated it.
reviews.negatives:
There was loud noise from the apartment next door until the middle of the night. However, when I asked the neighbors during the night, they became quieter. There was a locked door between the two apartments only, so all noise sounded like it was coming from the same apartment. 
Maybe putting a note on that door to inform the guests about this would be helpful in the future.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Convenient location to visit the old town of Hoa Lu and the Trang An heritage. Rooms are spacious, clean, and have strong water pressure.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Great location, clean room and friendly staffs.
reviews.negatives: Breakfast choices were limited, only 2 choices.

reviews.title: 2 room suite
reviews.text: A large bed in each room. Small foyer area for sitting with 2 chairs. The tub/shower set up makes the entire bathroom wet. Breakfast buffet is local style (pho, corn, sweet potato, etc.). Convenient to night market, restaurants and convenience stores.

reviews.title: Excellent stay with a clean, spacious room, friendly staff, and fast, reliable internet.
reviews.positives: Room was very clean and spacious. The staff were extremely kind and helpful throughout my stay. The internet was fast and reliable, which made it easy to keep up with my work.

reviews.title: Clean and friendly.
reviews.text: Spacious, clean, friendly - there is a parking lot for cars, and it's just a short walk to the pedestrian street.

reviews.title: It was very nice and we extended our stay there.
reviews.positives: The location was very good and the staff were very friendly and helpful the room was clean and very comfortable
reviews.negatives: Nothing everything was very good

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Nice, new facility with good breakfast and helpful staff

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Good Deal! Very clean and spacious, staff are very helpful .

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The hotel is clean, basic with full amenities, delicious breakfast, and enthusiastic staff. Very convenient near the old town.

reviews.title: Great stay, could recommend!
reviews.positives: Clean, good AC, good location. We booked this last minute after abandoning an airbnb. Staff was very helpful with scooter rental and arranging transportation back to Hanoi.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The hotel is newly built; the rooms are very new, worth the price, in a convenient location, but the only downside is that the reception staff is not well trained; their handling of situations is not good, and they don't have an attitude of "hoping customers understand." I booked a room on Agoda with a large bed, but when I arrived, it was two single beds. When I asked, the receptionist said there were no more rooms available and just pushed the two beds together. It's okay, no problem; breakfast starts at 7 AM, but I mentioned that I wanted to eat a little earlier because I had to set off early at 7 AM, and the response was no. The kitchen only opens at 7 AM. (I've never seen a hotel with breakfast starting that late), and I had to go out for breakfast even though it was included in the room price. The receptionist's replies were really disappointing and they were not welcoming when I checked in. (the male staff) If you don't care about the staff's attitude, this is still a place worth staying at.

reviews.title: Detalles feos
reviews.positives: La almohada muy cómoda y la limpieza, felicitaciones a la señora que lo limpió! Ha sido muy amable en todo momento.
reviews.negatives:
El recepcionista en concreto el moreno nos ha cobrado de más por salir 2h tarde, cuando tenía en booking incluida la salida más tarde. Te cobran el agua, cuando en el resto de hoteles de Vietnam era gratis. Desayuno sin variedad, fideos y sandía con pan de molde.
El alquiler de moto es muy elevado en comparación con el resto de locales y alquilamos menos de 24h y nos cobró lo mismo.
Esperemos esta reseña sirva para aprender y mejorar, estos detalles no gustan a los viajeros porque hoteles hay muchos y si no se cuida a los huéspedes el negocio no funciona.

reviews.title: Clean
reviews.text:
It's clean, and the staff is friendly. They try to help you kindly every time you ask a question.

There aren't any large supermarkets or bars nearby, but it's close to Old Town, so you can walk there.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Las habitaciones.
reviews.negatives:
El desayuno. Invariablemente era: 2 huevos fritos,dos lonchas de pan de sándwich. Café o té, leche condensada y margarina. Un día pregunté si no se podía variar algo.  Respuesta: Desea Ramen ?  Desayuné 2 días en toda la estancia.
A pesar de la información en Booking: pago con tarjeta de crédito sin comisión. También en su página oficial. Hubo un recargo de 129.000 WND :((

reviews.title: the hotel is okay
reviews.text: I am satisfied with the staff and team of the hotel. The room is beautiful and spacious. I will return to the hotel.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: La habitación era grande, super comodo
reviews.negatives: Se mojaba un poco el baño al bañarnos pero todo ok

reviews.title: A quiet and pleasant hotel...
reviews.text: The front staff is friendly and the room condition is good. The room is really spacious... it's close to Hoa Lu and the surrounding attractions are nice... I want to visit again.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
La habitación estaba genial,con mucho espacio y limpio y el mobiliario muy nuevo.
EL BAÑO MARAVILLA,algo que es de agradecer la verdad.
reviews.negatives: No es que no me gustara....pero podria mejorarse un poco nada mas.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: New hotel, clean rooms, convenient location for visiting tourist spots.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Habitación amplia y muy limpia. Tenían servicio de lavandería y alquiler de motos. Desayuno correcto y personal amable.
reviews.negatives: Nada, todo muy correcto.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Place was modern and clean and everything worked like it should.

reviews.title: Hôtel sans âme
reviews.positives: L’emplacement qui était très central
reviews.negatives:
Hôtel bruyant ; personnel peu serviable et peu sympathique. Petit déjeuner très restreint.
Pas de cabine de douche :très mal commode.

reviews.title: Hotel with breakfast included and a relaxing atmosphere.
reviews.text:
It is a little distance from popular spots like Hoa Lu and Trang An for Westerners. If you go by bike, it is not a concern.

The location is actually closer to the city center, with plenty of night markets and restaurants. Since it is off a quiet street, you won’t be bothered by noise at night. It offers a city view, so instead of a magnificent panorama, you see the town's scenery.

For breakfast, you can choose between Vietnamese style and Western food! It's highly recommended as it is very delicious. It usually operates as a restaurant serving pizza and pasta.

The rooms are very spacious, and I think they would be suitable for couples or families with children. I would recommend it for a long stay. The amenities are also well-equipped, but be careful as the shower booth and toilet are not separated.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Propreté impeccable, l'hôtel est bien situé.
reviews.negatives: Isolation phonique peut être améliorée entre les chambres.

reviews.title: Overall assessment is good, nothing to complain about.
reviews.text: New hotel, clean and beautiful, fully equipped with amenities, daily housekeeping service, worth the money.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Proche de la ville mais à 15 min en voiture des activités

reviews.title: Very good value accommodation.
reviews.text:
Ninh Binh trip..
I hesitated a bit after reading other customers' reviews, but proceeded with the booking!
The cleanliness of the accommodation was good, and it's about a 5-minute walk to Hoa Lu.
My worries were unfounded, it's a great place to stay.
Excellent value for money!

reviews.title: Tres bon séjour
reviews.positives: Hôtel neuf ou rénové. Calme et bien équipé. On peut laisser les valises toute la journée en attendant notre train de nuit. Toujours serviable

reviews.title: First time in ninh binn
reviews.text: We were allowed to check in early in the morning because the room was available. Hoang was very helpful. Thank you

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Den Family Room mit 2 separaten Zimmern war super, beide waren sehr groß und sauber. So groß haben wir noch nie gewohnt - Preis-/Leistung sehr gut.
Personal an der Rezeption sehr hilfsbereit.
reviews.negatives: Das Frühstück wurde serviert, musste im voraus bestellt werden (Spiegelei und Toast oder vietnamesisches Frühstück) - das war enttäuschend (im Verhältnis zu den bisherigen Hotel Frühstücken in Vietnam). Die Nachtischlampen können nur mit eigenem USB Stecker eingeschaltet werden - ansonsten nur Deckenleuchten.

reviews.title: It is a good accommodation.
reviews.text: We also offer motorcycle rentals, making it easy to move around to nearby tourist attractions, and in the evening, you can walk out to enjoy the night view while having a meal. The pickup vehicle also comes right in front of the hotel, making it convenient, and I really appreciate the staff's effort to help when using a translator.

reviews.title: Sehr angenehmer Aufenthalt- gerne wieder
reviews.positives: Die Unterkunft ist sehr sauber und ordentlich. Das Personal sowohl an der Theke als auch in der Küche sind freundlich, hilfsbereit und kundenorientiert.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Khách sạn, to mới và đẹp, tổng thể tốt, gần phố đi bộ, chỗ đậu xe rộng rãi, phòng ốc mới, sạch sẽ.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Das Personal war super freundlich und äußerst hilfsbereit. Es hat uns nach einer vom Busunternehmen stornierten Buchung unkompliziert und schnell weitergeholfen. Sodass wir unsere Reise fortsetzen konnten. Die Lage des Hotels war super. Die Sehenswürdigkeiten waren fußläufig erreichbar. Auch konnten wir problemlos einen Roller mieten. Das Zimmer war sehr groß, sauber und ruhig. Unser Aufenthalt war sehr komfortabel und angenehm. Wir können dieses Hotel mit ruhigem Gewissen weiterempfehlen. Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt. Das Frühstück war ausreichend und der Kaffee war richtig gut. Yder Dame am Empfang, leider haben wir den Namen vergessen, gebührt ein besonderes Lob.
reviews.negatives: Da gibt es nichts zu berichten. Alles bestens!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Convenient location. Good facilities in the room. The hotel's European restaurant is very good, reasonably priced, suitable if you're tired of goat meat or rice dishes.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Tutto perfetto
reviews.negatives: Poca scelta continentale alla colazione

reviews.title: Beautiful location, new amenities, clean.
reviews.text: Hotel near the walking street but quiet, newly furnished, clean, and fully equipped.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Het appartement was ruim en schoon met voldoende bergruimte. Dagelijks schoonmaakservice, redelijk WiFi. Tv was ingesteld voor Kereanen. Wel prettig om in beide ruimten tv te hebben. Heerlijke douche en uitstekend bed. Personeel bij receptie erg ongeïnteresseerd. Was inclusief ontbijt, maar na één rampzalige poging heb ik dat verder overgeslagen: zeer beperkte keuze en onbeschoft gedrag van andere gast.

reviews.title: Good Price for Value
reviews.text:
This place is about a hundred meters from the Hoa Lu Old Town. It's also located on a big road but not too busy, making it easy to travel around the city.

The room is like a studio apartment, big, comfy, and spacious. The place is newly renovated so things are still spotless. The restaurant was under construction when we were there, so they didn't serve breakfast. Nonetheless, there are plenty of local restaurants nearby. All the staff were very nice and helpful.

All in all, I would say this is a great place to stay.

reviews.title: 快適
reviews.positives: 部屋が広くてきれいだった。Wi－Fiも問題なく利用できた。食事の麺類もすごくおいしかった。フロントが24時間対応している。傘を自由に利用することができた。近くにスーパーやローカルの飲食店がある。
reviews.negatives: 部屋を掃除してくださいの札をかけていたがそうじがされていなかった。予約表にはビュッフェ形式の食事となっていたが、提供されたのは麺とフルーツとコーヒー。パンもあった。毎日違う麺の提供で美味しかったので問題はないですが…

reviews.title: Should stay
reviews.text: There is nothing to criticize. The bedroom is separate with a living room, 2 TVs, and 2 air conditioners. The room is very clean and new. Anyone coming to Ninh Binh should stay here!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
スタッフの対応が丁寧。部屋の掃除も行き届いている。
レストランの朝食はシンプルだが、昼食と夕食で釜焼きのピザを食べることごできる。
reviews.negatives: 朝食の飲み物がコーヒーと紅茶のみ。ジュースもあればよかった。

reviews.title: Well worth experiencing.
reviews.text: The hotel is clean, however, when first entering the room, there is still a slight smell. The air conditioner seems a bit weak (っ- ‸ – ς), and another downside is that the hotel does not have a fan. Overall, it is still very worthwhile to experience; the location is very convenient and accommodation is quite comfortable.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: 깨끗하고 직원들이 친절해요
reviews.negatives: 주변에 소음이 좀 있었어요

reviews.title: Tốt
reviews.text: Nhân viên nhiệt tình, khách sạn sạch sẽ

reviews.title: במיוחד לישראלים, שומרי כשרות
reviews.positives:
זהו מלון דירות חדש לגמרי. הכל עדיין בניילונים.., מהמם ומיוחד!
הכניסה למלון היא דרך החנות של המלון ואז מגיעים ללובי גדול ו3 קומות של דירות. בכל קומה שתי דירות יפיפיות מאובזרות הכי טוב שאפשר. עם כל הציוד האפשרי והכי מפנק שיש!
בקומה הרביעית יש בריכת ג'קוזי מפנקת, מקומות לשיזוף , בר ופינות ישיבה, מתחם מסאז.. חלום.
הצוות יוצא מגידרו כדי לעזור. בהכל!! הם פשוט מדהימים ואכפתיים. אנחנו שומרי כשרות וקיבלנו את חומרי הגלם שרצינו לארות הבוקר ופשוט בישלנו במיטבח של הדירה שלנו. הם דאגו לנו לביצים, ירקות, פירות, ריבה, לחם ועוד.. זה היה במקום ללכת לאכול את ארוחת הבוקר למטה בחדר האוכל של המלון.
המלון נמצא במיקום מעולה!! אין בכלל מיקום יוצר טוב מזה! דקה ברגל לבית חב"ד, הם מבינים מהי שבת ועושים הכל כדי להתחשב בנו. המלון נמצא בשדרה מרכזית שיש בה הכל - תופרת שתפרה לנו חליפות, שמלות ערב, אוברולים ועוד ממש בזול! (החנות של התופרת צמודה למלון, יש מלא המלצות של ישראלים שתלויות בחלון הראווה), צ'אנג להחליף כספים (הם פשוט החליפו לנו דולרים לדונג הויטנאמי באותו מחיר שהיינו מחליפים בבנק, בלי בעיה. כביסות- נתנו להם ובערה הכל חזר מגוהץ ומריח נפלא בעלות מיזערית.
במלון עצמו תפרנו נעליים!!! פשוט בוחרים מתוך הקטלוג שלהם ואז מגיעים 2 רצענים (זוג, אעשה וגבר מדהימים!!!) וממש לוקחים מידות של הרגל ותופרים נעלי עור הכי איכותיות שיש והכי יפות שיש ממש ממש בזול!!
עשינו שמלות ערב, חליפות גברים, נעליים יומיום, נעלי עקב, נעלי טבע נאות... היינו צריכים עוד,מזוודה רק בשביל הקניות האלו (-:
חשוב ממש- הכל הכל קרוב למלון- העיר העתיקה, השווקים, שוק הלילה, שייט הפנסים בנהר, מקומות הבילוי.. הכל בהליכה.
שהיינו צריכים הסעה לאטרקציות- המלון פשוט הזמין לנו רכב מפואר עם נהג שחיכה לנו בחוץ עד שנסיים..
הכל במחירים ממש זולים !
נחזור בוודאות!
ממליצה בחום!
reviews.negatives: אין דבר כזה. המלון 10 מתוך 10!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The new room is clean, fully furnished, and the staff and receptionists are friendly. I stayed for 2 days and the room was very clean. It is close to the old quarter, everyone can refer to it. ☺️

reviews.title: Kỳ nghỉ perfect 👍
reviews.positives: Ngay gần phố cổ, đi lại tiện, xung quanh ks nhiều quán ăn, nhân viên vui vẻ, nhiệt tình
reviews.negatives: Nhân viên ks có vẻ k trung thực, bé nhà mình có để quên quyển truyện tranh nhưng khi dọn phòng k thấy ai báo gì, k đáng gì nhưng con đã chọn để mang đi du lịch tức là con rất thích quyển truyện đó…..

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: This hotel was amazing, worth the money, big rooms, beds were comy, spotless, more like a 5 star accommodation. Near to ancient town. Staff very friendly, they had lift too, bathroom had bathtub. Seems like everything was just updated. Highly recommended, will definitely stay here when we go back.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Không có ăn sáng. Địa điểm gần với phố đi bộ, hôm mình đi nó mưa nên không đi nhiều được nhưng cũng tiện di chuyển. Phòng đẹp, sạch sẽ, rộng rãi, đầy đủ dụng cụ tiện nghi. Con đường ở cũng yên tĩnh, cảnh view không có gì đặc sắc nhưng mà cũng thoáng đãng.
reviews.negatives: Chai nước suối free và chai nước suối tính tiền giống nhau quá mình bỏ vào tủ lạnh uống cho mát mà cuối cùng mở nhầm phải tính tiền. Chai nào free mốt dán tag hay đổi thương hiệu giùm với ạ chứ khách sao phân biệt được...

reviews.title: The room is clean and spacious.
reviews.text: The hotel is about a 5-minute walk from the Old Quarter, the rooms are quite new, clean, well-equipped, reasonably priced, and there is also a breakfast buffet.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Ks ngay gần khu phố cổ Hoa Lư
reviews.negatives: Ổ điện gắn xa bàn làm việc

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I really like this hotel. If I have the opportunity to visit Ninh Binh again, I will book here again.

reviews.title: Tôi thích ở đây
reviews.positives: Ks mới, sạch sẽ. Phòng rộng rãi, thoải mái. Nhân viên thân thiện. Giá tốt

reviews.title: Happy couple
reviews.text: We would love to come back here on our next trip

reviews.title: Tốt
reviews.positives: Giá cả phải chăng, vị trí đẹp gần phố cổ
reviews.negatives: Đồ ăn sáng chưa được phong phú

reviews.title: Great, very cost-effective.
reviews.text: The hygiene is clean and tidy. The young man at the front desk who wears glasses is super nice and helped me solve many difficulties. Thank you again! Next time I will bring my family to Ningping and stay at this hotel again. I look forward to encountering you again!

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I have an allergic problem. This hotel is clean enough for my condition.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Nói chung là phòng gọn đẹp sạch sẽ, với mục đích của mình là đi chơi Ninh Bình là chính, thì đây là một phòng vừa đủ, vừa hợp lí lại đẹp để làm chỗ dừng chân. Ngay trung tâm nên tối mình muốn đi đâu cũng tiện hơn

reviews.title: The best hotel to stay in Ninh Binh.
reviews.text: The hotel near the ancient town of Hoa Lu and tourist attractions, breakfast is very tasty, and the rooms are clean. Overall, I give it 10 points.

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Taking my child to compete for 10 days. It's the first time staying in such a comfortable hotel, from the staff to the management, everything is great. If there’s a chance to come back, I would still prefer to stay here.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: New hotel, clean, fully equipped. Staff are okay. If I have the opportunity to visit Ninh Binh, I will still stay at this hotel.

reviews.title: Sự lựa chọn hợp lý. Sẽ quay lại thêm lần sau

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I only booked for 1 night, but the quality of the hotel and the service were so great that I booked an additional night. The staff were incredibly enthusiastic!

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Phòng mới , sạch sẽ, rộng rãi , tiện nghi đầy đủ , ở ngay tttp nên thuận tiện đi lại, ngay gần phố cổ . Rất thích , mà giá cả rất hợp lý. Mình sẽ gt nhiều cho mn

reviews.title: Très bien situé

reviews.title: 닌빈 2박추가
reviews.text:
이 숙소가 맘에들고 닌빈을 천천히 즐기려고 2박 추가해서 지냈어요.
주변이 관광지와 시장과도 멀지 않아 충분히 그 지역 즐길 수 있는 위치입니다.

reviews.title: Новый отель с шикарной сантехникой с очень достойным сочетанием цена/качества
reviews.positives:
Проживали в "Улучшенный двухместный номер с 1 кроватью"
Я бы оценил расположение как неплохое, на такси добирались до основных достопримечательностей меньше 15 минут. Отель новый, номер очень просторный и свежий. Сантехника очень высокого уровня и также новая, напор воды/температуры отличные. Посторонних шумов не слышали. Матрас очень удобный.
Большой SmartTV теливизор.
Спорный момент по поводу завтрака - базово он вьетнамский (суп фо бо и т.д.), но можно без проблем себе сделать тосты и попросить приготовить яйца (мы попросили сварить), также нам дали сгущенку и джемы
reviews.negatives: - Достаточно высокие и жесткие подушки, лично нам такие не очень подходят, поэтому оценивайте этот минус относительно своих собственных предпочтений

reviews.title: 완전 만족
reviews.text:
방과 거실이 분리되는 아파트형태로 신축느낌이고 아주 깨끗합니다.
게다가 조식도 그 가격에 줘서 놀랐어요.
다시 간다면 여기 또 묵을거예요.

reviews.title: Disaster
reviews.positives: Not much to be honest
reviews.negatives:
The receptionist made me pay an extra service charge so the hotel wouldn't have to pay their bank commission themselves... he was menacing and didn't give any alternatives... 
The breakfast was a disaster, not even a buffet, just a "dish" and I had 4 flies in the sauce...

reviews.title: 住宿便宜又乾淨
reviews.text:
我們訂的價格大概是 *** 美金
以這個價格來講房間蠻大的
而且很乾淨
早上有附早餐 可以選河粉或麵包
櫃台的人員也都很盡責 服務很好
小缺點是沒有乾溼分離
但整個品質我覺得不賴
